name: BOM Rainfall Radar
description: Real-time national radar rainfall accumulation composite. BOM WMS currently requires direct browser access — disabled until CORS is resolved.

name: BOM Wind Observations
description: Maximum wind gust observations from BOM automatic weather stations. BOM WMS currently requires direct browser access — disabled until CORS is resolved.

name: BOM River Heights
description: Current river and stream height gauge readings. BOM WMS currently requires direct browser access — disabled until CORS is resolved.

name: Flood Inundation Mapping
description: National flood inundation extent layers from Geoscience Australia. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: National Road Network
description: NSW administrative boundaries and transport features. Source: NSW SixMaps open data.

name: National Rail Network
description: National rail corridor and freight network. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: NHVR Heavy Vehicle Routes
description: National heavy vehicle access routes. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: Surface Geology
description: 1:5 million scale surface geology geo-regions from Geoscience Australia. Supports understanding of foundation soil and rock conditions at bridge sites.

name: Seismic Hazard Zones
description: Peak Ground Acceleration (PGA) seismic hazard map. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: Electricity Transmission
description: National high-voltage electricity transmission network. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: Gas & Petroleum Pipelines
description: Gas and petroleum pipeline network. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: Bushfire Prone Areas
description: Areas classified as high bushfire risk. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: National Parks & Protected Areas
description: Protected area boundaries including national parks and conservation reserves. Service endpoint retired — contact GA for updated URL.

name: ABS Statistical Areas (SA2)
description: ABS Statistical Area Level 2 boundaries. Useful for socioeconomic analysis and traffic demand modelling around bridge locations.
